zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne於1127年12月出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內維特勒-福藍c瓦斯時，他的父親Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois34歲，母親Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim19歲。他於1164年與Marie de France在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1147年登記服兵役。他去世於1181年3月16日在法國德 艾斯特奧布特洛也斯享年53歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne于1127年12月出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內維特勒-福藍c瓦斯时，他的父亲Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois34岁，母亲Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim19岁。他于1164年与Marie de France在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1147年登记服兵役。他去世于1181年3月16日在法国德 艾斯特奧布特洛也斯享年53岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯。

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Libéral'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Boguslaw, Tadeusz, Zbigniew, Zdzislaw.
Polish: nickname meaning ‘free’, a derivative of Latin liber ‘free’.
Italian: from the female personal name Libera, from Latin libera ‘free’, or a nickname from the Italian adjective libera with the same meaning.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne was born in December 1127, in Vitry-le-François, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, was 34 and his mother, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, was 19. He married Marie de France in 1164, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1147. He died on 16 March 1181, in Troyes, Aube, Grand Est, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne est né en décembre 1127, à Vitry-le-François, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Marie de France en 1164, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1147. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1181, à Troyes, Aube, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne im Dezember 1127 in Vitry-le-François, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois 34 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim 19. Er hat 1164 in Frankreich Marie de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1147 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 16. März 1181 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Troyes, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Marie de France nel 1164, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1147. ja.lifeSummary: Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagneが1127年12月にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンヴィトリ-レ-フランcオイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut IV le Grand de Bloisは34歳，母Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimは19歳であった。1164年にフランスでMarie de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年に兵役登録をした。彼は1181年3月16日にフランスグランド エストアウベトロイスで53歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne(이)가 1127년 12월 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 비트리-레-프랜c이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1164년 프랑스에서 Marie de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1181년 3월 16일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 트로예스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne nasceu em dezembro de 1127, em Vitry-le-François, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de France em 1164, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1147. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1181, em Troyes, Aube, Grand Est, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne родился декабрь 1127 г. в местности витри-ле-франcоис, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de France в 1164 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1147 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 16 марта 1181 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne nació en diciembre de 1127, en Vitry-le-François, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Thibaut IV le Grand de Blois, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Marie de France en 1164, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1147. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1181, en Troyes, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
